description: Brand identity brief generated after direction selection
tagline: AI that works on Monday morning
voice: Authoritative but not academic. Plain language over jargon. Skeptical of hype, enthusiastic about results. Uses case studies and numbers to make points.
audience: Operations directors, VPs of Engineering, and CTOs at mid-market companies who have budget authority and are tired of AI vendors selling futures. They want someone who's done it before.
positioning: The AI consultant who ships. Not another strategy firm — a hands-on partner who builds the first version with your team, then teaches them to maintain it.

visualIdentity.typography: Professional sans-serif (Inter), clean and readable. No design excess.
